## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## UI/UX Theme Checklist

- [ ] Uses semantic tokens where available
- [ ] Avoids new hardcoded color literals unless approved exception
- [ ] Preserves focus-visible and error state visibility
- [ ] Preserves warning and danger semantics with non-color cue
- [ ] Includes screenshots for updated critical surfaces

## Validation

- [ ] Relevant wave checklist items updated
- [ ] Theme matrix routes tested for affected scope
- [ ] Accessibility checks run for affected components

## Exceptions

List any approved style exceptions and rationale.
